prompt: I just onboarded a new client, Copper & Ground — a specialty coffee shop in Brooklyn. Their brand brief is at .claude/skills/client-content-creator/evals/files/coffee-brand-brief.md. Generate their full content package. For the blog, focus on the topic: why light-roast coffee tastes completely different from what most people expect.
assertions: The blog post topic is specifically about light-roast coffee expectations/reality
The blog post is between 500 and 700 words
The blog post contains zero em dashes (—)
The Instagram caption uses a hook line in the first sentence (not context, not backstory)
The reel concept references the brand's copper or cream color palette
The content does not use the word 'artisanal'
The LinkedIn post takes a thought-leadership angle, not just a copy of the Instagram post
Brand alignment notes section is present at the end
